summary: Round 2 fixed all 12 CRITICAL issues across 4 domains. Security: path traversal in plugin installer/loader/markdown-backend fixed via strict pluginId regex; SSRF in AI model endpoints fixed via isAllowedBaseUrl(); ReDoS in templates fixed by switching to replaceAll(); voice proxy body sanitization + size limits added; bulk operation caps (500 items) added; error message disclosure fixed for 500s. Performance: 4 critical memoization gaps fixed (TaskList buildChildStats, useAppState cascading API calls removed + single-pass badge counts, Today.tsx defaultDueDate); 13 additional perf fixes (useMemo, React.memo, Promise.all). Quality: 3 crash-risk JSON.parse calls protected; triplicated message-utils logic extracted to shared helper; infinite retry loop given backoff + cap; event listener leak fixed; 6 silent catches given logging. DX: shared task-extraction-patterns module created; any types replaced; plugin errors use NotFoundError/ValidationError; stale TODO removed. One residual finding: src/server.ts line 124 console.log was marked fixed in dx fix report but is still present (not truly critical — logger.info covers the message). 11 warning-level items remain deferred (third-party type stubs, LM Studio/Ollama URL constants, plugin instance typing, global body-size middleware, batch settings endpoint). 2469 tests pass, typecheck clean, lint 0 errors (73 pre-existing warnings).

failures.reason: src/server.ts line 124 console.log still present despite being marked fixed in round 2 dx fix report
failures.action_required: Remove console.log(`API server listening on port ${info.port}`) on line 124 of src/server.ts — logger.info on line 123 already covers this

focus_next_round: Add global Hono body-limit middleware (per-route: 25MB for voice, 10MB default)
Add batch settings endpoint (GET /api/settings/all) to replace 52 parallel API calls on mount
Create web-speech.d.ts to eliminate 3 any casts in browser-stt.ts
Wrap Sidebar, AIChatPanel, TaskDetailPanel in individual ErrorBoundary components
Extract DEFAULT_LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL and DEFAULT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL constants to config/defaults.ts
